roa.docketEntryComment: DA MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL PURSUANT TO CODE 1050 FILED

/CAL:DA MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:THE COURT FINDS GOODCAUSE TO GRANT THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE,/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 01-24-19/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 01-30-19/DOPC/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 02-11-19/987,2/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE REQUEST TO RELEASE DEFENDANT OUT OF CUSTODY AS FOLLOWS AND WITHTHE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//WEAP/X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED DRUGS/SA1:SHARONGEE MURILLO, RONALD MURILLO, DAJHIN LEE, MARIYAH MURILLO, AND RYLEE M/SA2:200 BROOKDALE AVE, SF AND 1310 GATEVIEW AVE, APT A, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:WITNESS UNAVAILABLE/CTORD:ELECTRONICMONITORING CONDITIONS ARE TERMINATED/
